calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant To San Francisco Superior Court Local Rule 6.6(D)(7)
Off Calendar Apr-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant F.T.S Logistics LLC, a/k/a FTS Logistics LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:45 a.m.

Eric Jun, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Benjamin Seeman, Senior Billing & Collection Manager, and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messsrs. Jun and Seeman appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant F.T.S Logistics LLC, a/k/a FTS Logistics LLC.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Open Book Account, Account Stated, Reasonable Value and Breach of Contract was filed on July 27, 2022, and served on defendant F.T.S Logistics LLC, a/k/a FTS Logistics LLC's Agent of Process via Certified Mail, with Return Receipt Requested, on September 1, 2021.
Default as to defendant F.T.S Logistics LLC, a/k/a FTS Logistics LLC, was entered on October 22, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 9, 2021.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Copy of Contract between Keep Truckin and defendant........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Copies fo the Customer Account and Invoices................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Copy of the Assignment to Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant F.T.S Logistics LLC, a/k/a FTS Logistics LLC., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $55,888.05.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,346.64.
Attorney Fees - $1,380.00.
Costs - $492.56.

Total - $63,107.25.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to the Court and signed.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 11:01 a.m.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant To San Francisco Superior Court Local Rule 6.6(D)(7)
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Continued To Apr-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2021 Continued To Apr-27-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
